title: podman version --format '{{.Server.APIVersion}}'
body:
Would be cool, if this one could be added:

```
❯ podman version --format '{{.Server.APIVersion}}'
Error: template: image:1:9: executing "image" at <.Server.APIVersion>: can't evaluate field APIVersion in type define.Version
```

as in PR #4608

_Originally posted by @haraldh in https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/4608#issuecomment-631664581_

comments.body:
So, we want to replace `docker` in a hosted github action runner. I thought about symlinking podman to /usr/bin/docker .. but then again the github runner does these:

```
/usr/bin/docker version --format '{{.Server.APIVersion}}'
/usr/bin/docker version --format '{{.Client.APIVersion}}'
/usr/bin/docker ps --all --quiet --no-trunc --filter "label=be76db"
/usr/bin/docker network prune --force --filter "label=be76db"
/usr/bin/docker network create --label be76db github_network_54b138268ee843d3b5d16d6316f88c2d
/usr/bin/docker pull quay.io/enarx/fedora-test
/usr/bin/docker create --name f9c87a7f7f25430f875a5f2d200773e7_quayioenarxfedoratest_c791e9 --label be76db --workdir /__w/enarx/enarx --network github_network_54b138268ee843d3b5d16d6316f88c2d -e "HOME=/github/home" -e GITHUB_ACTIONS=true -e CI=true -v "/var/run/docker.sock":"/var/run/docker.sock" -v "/home/runner/work":"/__w" -v "/home/runner/runners/2.262.1/externals":"/__e":ro -v "/home/runner/work/_temp":"/__w/_temp" -v "/home/runner/work/_actions":"/__w/_actions" -v "/opt/hostedtoolcache":"/__t" -v "/home/runner/work/_temp/_github_home":"/github/home" -v "/home/runner/work/_temp/_github_workflow":"/github/workflow" --entrypoint "tail" quay.io/enarx/fedora-test "-f" "/dev/null"
/usr/bin/docker start 7b961a1add9c5b52d9cbbf1dabd5a75fe43e17c026853da21b3e22959b435f88
/usr/bin/docker ps --all --filter id=7b961a1add9c5b52d9cbbf1dabd5a75fe43e17c026853da21b3e22959b435f88 --filter status=running --no-trunc --format "{{.ID}} {{.Status}}"
/usr/bin/docker inspect --format "{{range .Config.Env}}{{println .}}{{end}}" 7b961a1add9c5b52d9cbbf1dabd5a75fe43e17c026853da21b3e22959b435f88
/usr/bin/docker exec 7b961a1add9c5b52d9cbbf1dabd5a75fe43e17c026853da21b3e22959b435f88 sh -c "cat /etc/fedora-release /etc/os-release /etc/redhat-release /etc/system-release | grep ^ID"
/usr/bin/docker exec 7b961a1add9c5b52d9cbbf1dabd5a75fe43e17c026853da21b3e22959b435f88 sh -c "cat /etc/fedora-release /etc/os-release /etc/redhat-release /etc/system-release | grep ^ID"
/usr/bin/docker rm --force 7b961a1add9c5b52d9cbbf1dabd5a75fe43e17c026853da21b3e22959b435f88
/usr/bin/docker network rm github_network_54b138268ee843d3b5d16d6316f88c2d
```

and podman does not understand `--label` and `network` in rootless mode.

I might write a filter shim... 

starting with:
https://github.com/haraldh/docker-github-actions-runner/blob/develop/docker.sh
But then again... maybe it's not even possible to run rootless podman in rootless podman.
Well it will fix the podman  version one.
